metadata.description: Annual total returns (%) by asset class, ER-adjusted spliced series. Used for bootstrap Monte Carlo retirement simulation.
notes: Returns are annual total returns as percentages (e.g. 12.5 = 12.5%).
Null values indicate the asset has no data for that year (pre-native-start).
Bootstrap simulation should draw complete year rows to preserve cross-asset correlations.
TIPS (1985+), REIT (1972+), Gold (1969+), International (1970+), Emerging (1976+) have shorter native histories.
Style-box assets (LC/MC/SC Value/Growth/Blend sub-categories) spliced prior to 1927.
Sharpe ratio uses arithmetic mean return minus average T-Bill rate, divided by std dev.
CAGR = compound annual growth rate from geometric mean of annual returns.
